_doc: Direct PDF URLs for quarterly BRSA Financial Reports per Turkish bank. Sourced from each bank's investor relations site. Filenames are heterogeneous; future quarters need re-scraping (see README).

VAKBN.name: Türkiye Vakıflar Bankası T.A.O.
VAKBN._note: Solo files come as ZIPs containing PDF+XLSX. Q1/Q3 consolidated NOT published.

ICBCT.name: ICBC Turkey Bank A.Ş.
ICBCT._note: Filenames contain spaces and Turkish chars. Use proper UTF-8 encoding.

QNBFB.name: QNB Bank A.Ş. (formerly QNB Finansbank)
QNBFB._note: Opaque CMS file IDs. Need Referer header. Solo = Bank Only.

KLNMA.name: Türkiye Kalkınma ve Yatırım Bankası A.Ş.
KLNMA._note: Hash-based filenames. Only unconsolidated URLs collected by research agent.

ALNTF.name: Alternatifbank A.Ş.
ALNTF._note: 2026Q1 sourced from BDDK BdrUyg (institution code 124) — Alternatifbank FILED it (BdrUyg lists SOLO + KONSOLIDE 2026-03) but had not yet published it on its own IR site, whose newest report is still 31.12.2025. BdrUyg serves a ZIP; fetch_pdf_bytes unwraps it and verifies BDDK's chain via src/scrapers/_http.bddk_verify().

COLENDI.name: Colendi Bank A.Ş.
COLENDI._note: English editions (TR also published each quarter).

ZIRAATD.name: Ziraat Dinamik Banka A.Ş.
ZIRAATD._note: Full report = 'bagimsiz-denetim-raporu' file (~75pp); 'mali-tablolar' is a 7pp summary. 2025Q2 source PDF is corrupt on the IR site (served a non-PDF blob); 2024Q4/2025Q1 are KAP-only. Those three deferred — series starts 2025Q3.

DUNYAK.name: Dünya Katılım Bankası A.Ş.
DUNYAK._note: Server needs a Referer header (see sync_audit_reports.REFERERS).

TAKAS.name: İstanbul Takas ve Saklama Bankası A.Ş. (Takasbank)
TAKAS._note: Sourced from BDDK's BdrUyg registry (institution code 132), NOT the bank's own IR site — takasbank.com.tr sits behind an F5 WAF that rejects non-browser requests (CI would fail). BdrUyg serves a ZIP (kind unconsolidated_zip) bundling the financial report WITH an interim activity report; fetch_pdf_bytes prefers the non-'faaliyet' PDF. BDDK omits its GlobalSign intermediate cert, so fetch_pdf_bytes verifies via src/scrapers/_http.bddk_verify() (full verification, not a bypass). BdrUyg confirms SOLO-only filings, 2022-03..2026-03 — there is no consolidated report. 2022Q1 is OMITTED: its PDF has a broken font cmap (text layer returns raw glyph codes, a constant -29 shift, e.g. ')ø1$16$/ 9$5/,./$5' = 'FİNANSAL VARLIKLAR'), so the page anchors can't match; numbers are intact but labels are mojibake. PEER-EXCLUDED from ranking/market-share/HHI — see PEER_EXCLUDED_TICKERS in bank_names.ts.
